sections.heading: So sánh hơn (Comparatives)
sections.content:
**Tính từ ngắn:** adj + -er + than
**Tính từ dài:** more + adj + than
**Bất quy tắc:** good→better, bad→worse, far→farther

examples.en: This book is **cheaper than** that one.
examples.vi: Quyển sách này rẻ hơn quyển kia.
Tiếng Anh thú vị hơn toán.

sections.heading: So sánh nhất (Superlatives)
sections.content:
**Tính từ ngắn:** the + adj-est
**Tính từ dài:** the most + adj
**Bất quy tắc:** good→the best, bad→the worst

examples.en: She is **the tallest** in our class.
This is **the most beautiful** city I've visited.
examples.vi: Đây là thành phố đẹp nhất tôi đã đến.
Đó là bộ phim tệ nhất từ trước đến nay.

exercises.question: A car is ___ than a bicycle.
This is ___ movie I've ever seen.
She is ___ (smart) student in the class.

exercises.sentence: He is more taller than his brother.
exercises.correctSentence: He is taller than his brother.

exercises.sentence: This is the most cheapest phone in the store.
exercises.correctSentence: This is the cheapest phone in the store.

exercises.question: This exercise is ___ (difficult) than the last one.
